chunks.text: EECS Undergraduate Newsletter | May 2, 2025 - EECS at Berkeley. This newsletter provides updates and information for undergraduate students in the Electrical Engineering and Computer Sciences department at UC Berkeley. It covers recent announcements, events, and opportunities relevant to the EECS community.

The newsletter includes categories such as Newsletter and View, with content like Open Faculty Positions. It aims to keep students informed about academic and professional developments within the department.
